in: path
required: true
cni-attachment-id:
description: ID assigned to this attachment by container runtime
type: string
+      # The identifiers below are retained for backwards compatibility only.
+      # Nothing populates these anymore, but during an upgrade older agents may
+      # still set them on the CiliumEndpoint CRD. The fields must stay in the
+      # schema so the generated CRD keeps accepting those objects. Do not
+      # remove.
container-id:
description: ID assigned by container runtime (deprecated, may not be unique)
type: string
container-name:
description: Name assigned to container (deprecated, may not be unique)
type: string
-      # docker-endpoint-id and docker-network-id are retained for backwards
-      # compatibility only. The cilium-docker plugin has been removed and nothing
-      # populates these anymore, but during an upgrade older agents may still set
-      # them on the CiliumEndpoint CRD. The fields must stay in the schema so the
-      # generated CRD keeps accepting those objects. Do not remove.
docker-endpoint-id:
description: Docker endpoint ID
type: string
"endpoint-id": {
"type": "string",

-      "description": "String describing an endpoint with the format ` + "`" + `` + "`" + `[prefix:]id` + "`" + `` + "`" + `. If no prefix
is specified, a prefix of ` + "`" + `` + "`" + `cilium-local:` + "`" + `` + "`" + ` is assumed. Not all endpoints
will be addressable by all endpoint ID prefixes with the exception of the
local Cilium UUID which is assigned to all endpoints.

Supported endpoint id prefixes:
  - cilium-local: Local Cilium endpoint UUID, e.g. cilium-local:3389595
  - cilium-global: Global Cilium endpoint UUID, e.g. cilium-global:cluster1:nodeX:452343
  - cni-attachment-id: CNI attachment ID, e.g. cni-attachment-id:22222:eth0
  - container-id: Container runtime ID, e.g. container-id:22222 (deprecated, may not be unique)
  - pod-name: pod name for this container if K8s is enabled, e.g. pod-name:default:foobar (deprecated, may not be unique)
  - cep-name: cep name for this container if K8s is enabled, e.g. pod-name:default:foobar-net1
",

+      "description": "String describing an endpoint with the format ` + "`" + `` + "`" + `[prefix:]id` + "`" + `` + "`" + `. If no prefix

will be addressable by all endpoint ID prefixes with the exception of the

is specified, a prefix of ` + "`" + `` + "`" + `cilium-local:` + "`" + `` + "`" + ` is assumed. Not all endpoints
will be addressable by all endpoint ID prefixes with the exception of the
local Cilium UUID which is assigned to all endpoints.

Supported endpoint id prefixes:
  - cilium-local: Local Cilium endpoint UUID, e.g. cilium-local:3389595
  - cilium-global: Global Cilium endpoint UUID, e.g. cilium-global:cluster1:nodeX:452343
  - cni-attachment-id: CNI attachment ID, e.g. cni-attachment-id:22222:eth0
  - container-id: Container runtime ID, e.g. container-id:22222 (deprecated, may not be unique)
  - pod-name: pod name for this container if K8s is enabled, e.g. pod-name:default:foobar (deprecated, may not be unique)
  - cep-name: cep name for this container if K8s is enabled, e.g. pod-name:default:foobar-net1
",
